title: shahedcr
description: create shahed136 shahed136slow  montier and shahedlauncher
body:
This mod adds new crafting recipes and utility features focused on Shahed drones to enhance your gameplay experience. Players can now craft both the standard Shahed drone and a slower “Slow Shahed” variant, each designed for different tactical situations. The standard version offers balanced performance, while the slow variant provides extended control and precision during flight.

In addition, the mod introduces crafting recipes for a Shahed drone maintenance tool, allowing players to manage and prepare their drones more efficiently. A dedicated Shahed launcher is also included, complete with its own recipe and functionality, making deployment easier and more immersive.

Beyond new items, the mod includes performance optimizations aimed at reducing lag, ensuring smoother gameplay even when multiple drones are active. This makes it suitable for both singleplayer and multiplayer environments.

Overall, this mod is designed for players who enjoy technical gameplay and want to expand their experience with drone-based mechanics. With new recipes, tools, and optimizations, it provides both functionality and improved performance in one package.
